LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT BARCELINO CONTINENTAL CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER THE 2004 CONTRACT ALLOWED DEFENDANT USE OF PLAINTIFF'S IMAGES IN THE FUTURE. AND AS TO WHETHER A REASONABLE PERSON WOULD HAVE DISCOVERED DEFENDANT'S ALLEGEDLY WRONGFUL USE PRIOR TO THE LIMITATION PERIOD. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
